title: The Big Picture: OFAC Sanctions
summary:
Main
Will China and India receive sanctioned tankers? This question gained relevance today as the US slapped sanctions on another 82 Aframax/LR2s, 26 MRs, 23 Suezmax/LR3s, 11 Panamax/LR1s and five VLCCs. These vessels carried a little under half (45% by volume) of Russia's crude exports in 2024 and 7% of its refined products.
